pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support or correctly handle Java 21 language features and bytecode generation.
